_comment: Species: Slaughter True Body (杀戮真身) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Slaughter True Body

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of slaughter 8 m, body is living killing-intent, eyes are blood-pools
canonical.size: 8 m manifestation, 0 jin (slaughter); true form spans battlefield-realms
canonical.behavior: Slaughter-incarnate being; cultivates by absorbing slaughter-qi; Lu Mo's true body
canonical.relationships: Lu Mo (Wang Lin's clone) obtained slaughter true body (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: slaughter_true_body_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
